name: Marinated Steak Italian
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds to 2 1/2 pound t-boneless sirloin or top loin steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour half a cup of the Italian dressing over the steak in a shallow dish.
2. Cover and refrigerate, turning occasionally for 30 minutes to 24 hours.
3. Remove the steak from the marinade.
4. Grill or broil the steak, turning frequently and brushing with the remaining dressing until it reaches the desired doneness.
